requirement_topic.en: EMC and Power Quality — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-Series Evidence for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC和电能质量——光伏逆变器IEC 62920及IEC 61000系列证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC和電能品質——光伏逆變器IEC 62920及IEC 61000系列證據

summary.en: Solomon Islands does not have a widely visible standalone national EMC rule for PV inverters in the same way as larger regulated markets. For grid-tied PV projects, EMC and power-quality evidence should be aligned with the utility or project specification, normally using IEC 62920 for PV power conversion equipment and IEC 61000-series harmonic, flicker, immunity, and emissions evidence. Where project documents reference Australia/New Zealand legacy practice, confirm whether AS/NZS-adopted IEC evidence is required.
summary.zh: 所罗门群岛并不像大型监管市场那样有广泛可见的独立光伏逆变器国家EMC规则。对并网光伏项目，EMC和电能质量证据应与公用事业或项目规格一致，通常使用IEC 62920作为光伏功率变换设备标准，并提供IEC 61000系列谐波、闪变、抗扰度和发射证据。若项目文件引用澳新传统做法，应确认是否需要AS/NZS采纳的IEC证据。
summary.zht: 索羅門群島並不像大型監管市場那樣有廣泛可見的獨立光伏逆變器國家EMC規則。對併網光伏項目，EMC和電能品質證據應與公用事業或項目規格一致，通常使用IEC 62920作為光伏功率轉換設備標準，並提供IEC 61000系列諧波、閃變、抗擾度和發射證據。若項目文件引用澳紐傳統做法，應確認是否需要AS/NZS採納的IEC證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test methods and limits
IEC 61000-3-2 / IEC 61000-3-12 — Harmonic current emission limits, as applicable by current and project scope
Project-specific Solomon Power, owner, IEC, or AS/NZS-derived EMC requirements

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is often generated under GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, or related China domestic certification programmes. These reports may use IEC 61000-family methods but are scoped to Chinese standards, Chinese grid voltage assumptions, and domestic certification needs. They are not automatic substitutes for IEC 62920 or project-specified IEC 61000 reports in Solomon Islands submissions.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常依据GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004或相关中国国内认证计划生成。这些报告可能使用IEC 61000系列方法，但范围限定于中国标准、中国电网电压假设和国内认证需求。它们不会自动替代所罗门群岛提交材料中的IEC 62920或项目指定IEC 61000报告。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常依據GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004或相關中國國內認證計畫生成。這些報告可能使用IEC 61000系列方法，但範圍限定於中國標準、中國電網電壓假設和國內認證需求。它們不會自動替代索羅門群島提交材料中的IEC 62920或項目指定IEC 61000報告。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: A China-only EMC certificate may not satisfy Solomon Power, project-owner, IEC, or AS/NZS-derived EMC evidence expectations. Prepare IEC 62920 and relevant IEC 61000 reports for the specific inverter model and configuration. If harmonics or power-quality testing was performed at China 220/380 V, confirm whether the project engineer requires retesting or a technical justification for operation at Solomon Islands 230/400 V 50 Hz.
gap.zh: 差距：仅有中国EMC证书可能不满足Solomon Power、项目业主、IEC或源自AS/NZS的EMC证据期望。应为具体逆变器型号和配置准备IEC 62920及相关IEC 61000报告。若谐波或电能质量测试是在中国220/380 V条件下完成，应确认项目工程师是否要求针对所罗门群岛230/400 V 50 Hz运行重新测试或提供技术论证。
gap.zht: 差距：僅有中國EMC證書可能不滿足Solomon Power、項目業主、IEC或源自AS/NZS的EMC證據期望。應為具體逆變器型號和配置準備IEC 62920及相關IEC 61000報告。若諧波或電能品質測試是在中國220/380 V條件下完成，應確認項目工程師是否要求針對索羅門群島230/400 V 50 Hz運行重新測試或提供技術論證。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific; commonly mandatory in practice for grid-tied PV procurement and utility review when IEC or AS/NZS-derived EMC evidence is specified
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese domestic EMC evidence may support the file but is not automatically accepted as IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 project evidence

source.publisher: International Organization for Standardization member listing for Solomon Islands standards body context

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on GB/T EMC certificates alone for Solomon Islands PV projects. Build an IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 evidence pack for the exact inverter model and check whether AS/NZS-derived project wording changes the report format or laboratory acceptance route. Confirm any 230/400 V retesting expectation before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅依赖GB/T EMC证书用于所罗门群岛光伏项目。应为具体逆变器型号建立IEC 62920和IEC 61000证据包，并核实源自AS/NZS的项目条款是否改变报告格式或实验室接受路径。出货前请确认是否预期按230/400 V重新测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅依賴GB/T EMC證書用於索羅門群島光伏項目。應為具體逆變器型號建立IEC 62920和IEC 61000證據包，並核實源自AS/NZS的項目條款是否改變報告格式或實驗室接受路徑。出貨前請確認是否預期按230/400 V重新測試。
